llm_rationale.CMCSA: KEEP: PE 4.7, deleveraging, huge FCF, real 4.3% reduction — textbook value buyback
llm_rationale.PYPL: KEEP: deleveraging -18% while buying back 7.4%, PE 7.5, FCF-rich
llm_rationale.ADBE: KEEP: ROA 24% franchise, PE 11.3 (cheap for Adobe), 6.1% reduction
llm_rationale.HCA: KEEP: serial buyback compounder, PE 12.7, 9.5% real reduction, FCF+
llm_rationale.DHI: KEEP: homebuilder, PE 14.6, 7.9% reduction, disciplined (cyclical caveat)
llm_rationale.EBAY: KEEP: steady FCF, 4.1% reduction, reasonable valuation
llm_rationale.VLO: KEEP: refiner, PE 18, 5.1% reduction, FCF+, ROA 7% (cyclical)
llm_rationale.TTE: KEEP: oil major, disciplined buyback+dividend, PE 18
llm_rationale.IMO: KEEP: Imperial Oil, disciplined energy capital return
llm_rationale.GM: KEEP: 7.8% reduction, deleveraging, autos cheap (trough-earnings PE caveat)
llm_rationale.BAC: KEEP(bank): PE 13, 5.5% reduction, well-capitalized megabank regulatory capital return; 'debt' is deposits
llm_rationale.C: KEEP(bank): PE 15 below book, 7.6% reduction, capital-return turnaround
llm_rationale.WFC: KEEP(bank): PE 12, 6.1% reduction, post-asset-cap; +44% 'debt' is funding not a red flag
llm_rationale.AIG: KEEP(insurer): PE 12.5, 9.4% reduction, capital return restructuring
llm_rationale.GS: KEEP(bank): PE 17, quality franchise, capital return (volatile-earnings caveat)
llm_rationale.XOM: KEEP: energy major, disciplined; +27% debt is M&A-related, franchise quality
llm_rationale.VOD: DROP: negative FCF, negative PE, declining telecom buying back a melting business
llm_rationale.HMC: DROP: ~0% actual share reduction — the buyback isn't reducing count; negative ROA
llm_rationale.TWLO: DROP: PE 301, 0.6% reduction — buying back at nosebleed valuation
llm_rationale.HLT: DROP: PE 49 + rising debt — expensive, debt-tinged
llm_rationale.LNG: DROP: PE 34, energy infra with rising debt
llm_rationale.KR: DROP: PE 32 — grocer buying back richly, thin margins
llm_rationale.BCS: DROP: foreign bank, negative FCF flag, less transparency
llm_rationale.BTI: DROP: negative FCF flag, declining tobacco (borderline cash-cow — excluded for caution)
llm_rationale.NTRS: DROP: trust bank, thin ROA, no valuation edge
llm_rationale.STT: DROP: custody bank, negative FCF flag, thin ROA
llm_rationale.BNY: DROP: custody bank, thin ROA, no valuation edge
llm_rationale.MTB: DROP: regional bank, debt +58% flag, no clear edge
